hero.description: From financial documents to reasoning traces — structured for agents to act on, not humans to review.

Data generated by agents, annotated by agents,
used by agents, trained for agents.
features: Agents annotate with reasoning traces and execution logs.

Reasoning traces, tool calls, and decision paths — not just labels.
